products.name: A Glimpse of Heaven Bracelet
products.alt: A Glimpse of Heaven bracelet with twelve colorful gemstones, sterling silver spacers, and a silver cross charm
products.description: Our signature piece. Twelve gemstones for the twelve foundation stones of the New Jerusalem, finished with a sterling silver cross. A wearable reminder of our eternal home.
details: All twelve foundation stones of Revelation 21:19-20
Genuine gemstones, freshwater pearls, and Swarovski crystals
Sterling silver and Bali silver accents
Sterling silver cross charm and lobster clasp
Handmade to order; sizing and stone variations welcome

products.name: Gemstone Silk Knotted Necklace
products.alt: Hand-knotted silk necklace with aquamarine, freshwater pearls, peridot, turquoise, garnet, and citrine gemstones
products.description: A 19-inch necklace strung on hand-knotted silk in the old-world tradition. Aquamarine, freshwater pearls, peridot, turquoise, garnet, and citrine with Bali and sterling silver.
details: Aquamarine, peridot, turquoise, garnet, and citrine
Sterling silver clasp with Bali silver accents

products.name: One-of-a-Kind Pieces
products.alt: A colorful collection of handmade gemstone bracelets and necklaces in blues, greens, ambers, and reds
products.description: Every piece Patti makes is one of a kind. Lava stone, jade, carnelian, amber, shell, and hand-picked artisan beads come together in designs you will not find anywhere else. Reach out to see what is currently on the worktable, or request a custom piece.
details: Made with prayer and care in Texas
